title: Better Pigs
description: Cows have leather, sheep have wool, and chickens have feathers. But pigs have always lacked a unique feature. This pack aims to make pigs a tiny bit more interesting by making them produce more piglets and giving them the ability to forage for mushrooms.
body:
[Cows](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Cow) have leather, [sheep](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Sheep) have wool, and [chickens](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Chicken) have feathers. But [pigs](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Pig) have always gotten the short end of the stick in Minecraft. This pack aims to make pigs a tiny bit more interesting by making them produce more piglets and giving them the ability to forage for [mushrooms](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mushroom) in [mud](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mud).

**Features**

- More Piglets.
  - Breeding pigs will now result in 1-5 piglets. The more pigs nearby the lower the chance for additional piglets﻿, so make sure to give them ample space to live!
- Mushroom Foraging.
  - Feeding a pig a [carrot](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Carrot) will make it look for a willing partner, if it is unable to find one within the given time (30 seconds) the pig will instead attempt to forage for mushrooms.
  - Mushrooms can be found in [mud](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mud), [mycelium](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mycelium), and [podzol](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Podzol).
  - Fungus can be found in [soul soil]([https://minecraft.wiki/w/Podzol](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Soul_Soil)).
